title: Starlink's New V5 Dish: No Speed Boost, But It Trims Power Consumption, Weight
summary: Starlink’s new V5 dish won’t offer increased internet speeds, but it does feature upgrades that reduce the hardware’s weight, size, and power consumption, according to SpaceX.
